parties.name: RIVERA, CARMEN 157 BROOKDALE AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioner: Carmen Rivera, present in pro per, was swron and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Carmen Sanchez.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-17-2004 Reset To Sep-02-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Carmen Rivera, present in pro per, was late and admonished, was swron and examined.
Without a valid Proof of Publication, the Court continued the hearing to Sept. 2, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
